name: profile-suggest detects a JavaScript or TypeScript stack from a package.json present at the repo root
command: mkdir -p repo && printf '{"name":"x","dependencies":{"react":"^18"}}\n' > repo/package.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/profile-suggest/scan.sh" --root repo 2>out.txt && grep -q 'stack=javascript' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
